payload.message: Today is the daily update day for AI+Smart Logistics topic. Please execute the following steps: 1. Use web_search to search for the latest 3 days of AI pharmaceutical logistics news 2. Filter out 3-5 most valuable real news events 3. Write a commentary for each news item 4. Read topics/ai-smart-logistics.html 5. Create a new HTML file 6. Add new articles to the top 7. Update homepage 8. Execute git push 9. Reply with today's update summary
